attributes.description: Dashboard for RUM events collected by OTEL web agents

embeddableConfig.content: This dashboard provides an overview of your web applications performance and health, including number of visits, page load times and top errors. Use it to monitor your web applications instrumented by the OpenTelemetry JS SDK.
embeddableConfig.title: OpenTelemetry RUM

query.esql:
FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `Total Visits` = COUNT(*)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `Total Visits` = COUNT(*)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `Load Median` = MEDIAN(transaction.duration.us)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `Load Median` = MEDIAN(transaction.duration.us)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `95th percentile` = PERCENTILE(transaction.duration.us, 95)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `95th percentile` = PERCENTILE(transaction.duration.us, 95)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `Total Visits` = COUNT(*) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `Total Visits` = COUNT(*) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS bucket_count = COUNT(attributes.transaction.duration.us) BY Duration = BUCKET(transaction.duration.us, 10000)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS bucket_count = COUNT(attributes.transaction.duration.us) BY Duration = BUCKET(transaction.duration.us, 10000)

FROM logs-*.otel-* METADATA _index 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
 | WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs"
 | WHERE attributes.exception.message IS NOT NULL
 | STATS `COUNT`=COUNT(*), example=SAMPLE(attributes.exception.message, 1), browser=SAMPLE(resource.attributes.browser.name, 1) BY ERROR=CATEGORIZE(attributes.exception.stacktrace)
 | SORT COUNT DESC

FROM logs-*.otel-* METADATA _index 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
 | WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs"
 | WHERE attributes.exception.message IS NOT NULL
 | STATS `COUNT`=COUNT(*), example=SAMPLE(attributes.exception.message, 1), browser=SAMPLE(resource.attributes.browser.name, 1) BY ERROR=CATEGORIZE(attributes.exception.stacktrace)
 | SORT COUNT DESC

embeddableConfig.title: Top Errors
embeddableConfig.description: This table displays the top errors grouped by similarity in the stack trace.

query.esql:
FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS bucket_count = COUNT(*) BY Browser = browser.name

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS bucket_count = COUNT(*) BY Browser = browser.name

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS bucket_count = COUNT(*) BY OS = browser.platform

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS bucket_count = COUNT(*) BY OS = browser.platform

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `99th percentile` = PERCENTILE(transaction.duration.us, 99)

FROM traces-*.otel-* 
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE resource.attributes.telemetry.sdk.language == "webjs" 
    AND scope.attributes.service.framework.name == "@opentelemetry/instrumentation-document-load" 
    AND transaction.name == "documentLoad"
| STATS `99th percentile` = PERCENTILE(transaction.duration.us, 99)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "lcp"
| STATS lcp = ??agg_func(browser.web_vital.value)::double
| EVAL max_val = CASE(lcp > 6000.0, lcp*1.1, 6000.0)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "lcp"
| STATS lcp = ??agg_func(browser.web_vital.value)::double
| EVAL max_val = CASE(lcp > 6000.0, lcp*1.1, 6000.0)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "lcp"
| STATS `min` = MIN(browser.web_vital.value),
    `avg` = AVG(browser.web_vital.value),
    `max` = MAX(browser.web_vital.value) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "lcp"
| STATS `min` = MIN(browser.web_vital.value),
    `avg` = AVG(browser.web_vital.value),
    `max` = MAX(browser.web_vital.value) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)

embeddableConfig.esql_query:
FROM logs-*.otel-*
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE browser.name  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?browser, browser.name)
| WHERE browser.platform  IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?os, browser.platform)
| WHERE browser.web_vital.name == "lcp"
| STATS lcp = ??(browser.web_vital.value)::double
| EVAL max_val = CASE(lcp > 6000.0, lcp, 6000.0)

config.esql_query:
FROM logs-*.otel-* 
| WHERE @timestamp <= ?_tend and @timestamp > ?_tstart
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE telemetry.sdk.language  == "webjs"
| STATS BY browser.name

FROM logs-*.otel-* 
| WHERE @timestamp <= ?_tend and @timestamp > ?_tstart 
| WHERE telemetry.sdk.language  == "webjs"
| STATS BY service.name

FROM logs-*.otel-* 
| WHERE @timestamp <= ?_tend and @timestamp > ?_tstart
| WHERE service.name IS NOT NULL AND MV_CONTAINS(?service_name, service.name)
| WHERE telemetry.sdk.language  == "webjs"
| STATS BY browser.platform

attributes.title: OpenTelemetry RUM JS
